name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Nec
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends an NEC infrared remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The 16-bit address to send, see dumper output for more details.

config_entries.label: Command Repeats
config_entries.description: The number of times the command bytes are sent in one transmission. Defaults to `1`.
